title: First-Time Voter Registration
description: A step-by-step guide to registering as a voter using Form 6.

start.content: Are you an Indian citizen who is 18 years of age or older?

not_eligible.content: You must be an Indian citizen and at least 18 years old to register to vote.

age_proof.content: Do you have a valid Proof of Age document (e.g., Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Driving License, 10th Class Certificate)?

age_proof_alternatives.content: If you don't have the standard documents, you can also provide a birth certificate from a municipal authority or a baptism certificate. Once you have a valid document, proceed to the next step.

address_proof.content: Do you have a valid Proof of Residence document (e.g., Aadhaar Card, Indian Passport, Electricity/Water/Gas bill, Bank Passbook)?

address_proof_alternatives.content: If you live with your parents, you can use their proof of address along with a document establishing your relationship with them. Once ready, proceed to the next step.

photo_req.content: Great. You will also need a recent passport-size photograph (with a light background). Keep a scanned copy ready if applying online.

apply_online.content: You have all the necessary documents. You can now apply online by filling out **Form 6** on the Voter Services Portal.
